use_codes.desc: PRETREATMENT AGAINST THE LETHAL EFFECTS OF SOMAN NERVE AGENT POISONING

indications.text:
Pyridostigmine bromide is indicated for pretreatment against the lethal effects of soman nerve agent poisoning
in adults. Pyridostigmine bromide is intended for use in conjunction with protective garments, including a mask.
At the first sign of nerve agent poisoning, pyridostigmine bromide should be...
